title: Every time period, change status of the entire column, or uncheck check box
excerpt: Hi, for people using a monday board as a montlhy or weekly task list, wouldn’t it be nice to have an automation where every time period, say every monday at 9, the status of the entire column would change back to undone …

posts.author: rosecote (Rosemarie Cote)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, for people using a monday board as a montlhy or weekly task list, wouldn’t it be nice to have an automation where every time period, say every monday at 9, the status of the entire column would change back to undone or if it is a check box the column becomes unchecked. So then every week all the task would be marked as undone. And we wouldn’t have to manually change all the status one by one every week/month and or uncheck all of the boxes.

A lot of jobs have task that comes back every week/months and this feature would be time saving!

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Recurring Task Automations App includes 4 different recipes that update or clear columns recurringly
Every time period set status to something for this item

Every time period assing person as assignee for this item

Every time period clear column for this item

Every time period set number to value for this item
